summary: Iteration 10 — Fase B (servicios sin paquete, contactos agencia/turista, edicion+historial, archivar/eliminar+auditoria) end-to-end PASS. Backend 6/6 (2 from test_fase_b_quotations + 4 new in test_iteration10_regression: package+PDF+public link, audit visibility/RBAC, archived filter). Frontend UI: full happy-path executed as company_admin (admin@aventurate.mx) — Type selector at /app/quotations/new shows BOTH type-paquete and type-servicios; selecting Servicios switches to 3-step flow (Cliente + step-servicios + Revision, step-package/step-dates absent) and selecting Paquete restores the 5-step flow with step-package + step-dates + step-services. Servicios quotation E2E: picked Agencia Viajes del Sol (channel=agencia) → contacts-block appeared and accepted agency-name/contact/email + traveler-name/phone; on step-servicios set servicios-personas=4 and toggled 1 service; builder-submit landed on detail showing 'Servicios a la carta' badge, total $416.84 MXN (>0), no itinerary/hotel, detail-contacts rendering 'Agencia XYZ / Ana Lopez / ana@xyz.com' and 'Juan Pérez / 5512345678', history 'Cotización creada (servicios a la carta)'. Selecting Laura Ramírez (channel=directo) correctly DOES NOT render contacts-block. Edit: edit-quotation-btn navigated to /:id/edit, type-paquete disabled (HTML disabled attribute present), changing servicios-personas + builder-submit returned to detail and history-panel showed 'Editó: fechas, habitaciones/pax, servicios, noches extra, contactos, notas'. state-btn-ganada added 'Estado: Nueva consulta → Ganada' to history-panel. archive-quotation-btn excluded quotation from /app/quotations default list; toggle-archived showed it under archived; delete-quotation-btn removed it. nav-audit in the sidebar opened /app/audit with audit-table + audit-filter listing the new Ganada/Archivada/Eliminada rows for COT-2026046, plus a working 'Todas las acciones' filter. Regression: backend confirmed package quotation creation + PDF (%PDF header) + public link (GET /quotations/public/{token} 200), and the new UI flow surfaces 'temporada' season-pricing copy on the dates step. Console showed no errors beyond the expected pre-login 401s on /auth/me. No mocks. All test data created during this run was cleaned up via Eliminar/DELETE.
critical_code_review_comments: QuotationBuilder.jsx: package cards on the Paquete step do not expose a data-testid (e.g. package-card-<id>). Other steps do (type-paquete, step-servicios, servicios-personas, service-toggle-<id>, contacts-block, builder-submit, etc.) — adding `data-testid=package-card-<id>` and `hotel-option-<idx>` would close the only remaining gap for full Playwright coverage of the package flow. Currently the package regression flow has to be validated through the API.
QuotationBuilder edit mode disables type cards via the HTML `disabled` attribute on the button but does not also set `aria-disabled` (a11y nit). Functional behavior is correct.
Pre-login the frontend hits /api/auth/me which returns 401 (visible in console). Expected, but a quick `withCredentials` fast-path / skip on `/login` would silence the noise.
AuditLog filter is a native <select>; consider migrating to the shadcn Select for visual consistency with the rest of the company-admin panel (Cotizaciones list filters use shadcn).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_regression.py (new — 4 tests, all PASS: package+PDF+public link, audit visibility, audit RBAC for executive, archived filter restore)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on every required Fase B testid (type-paquete, type-servicios, step-servicios, step-package, step-dates, step-services, servicios-personas, service-toggle-<id>, builder-submit, contacts-block, contact-agency-*, contact-traveler-*, detail-contacts, edit-quotation-btn, history-panel, state-btn-ganada, archive-quotation-btn, delete-quotation-btn, toggle-archived, nav-audit, audit-table, audit-filter)

test_credentials: admin@aventurate.mx / Demo2026! (company_admin) + ejecutivo@aventurate.mx / Demo2026! (executive, used to assert 403 on /api/audit-log). Matches /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: No persistent test data left behind: the servicios quotation COT-2026046 was archived → restored → deleted as part of the flow; the package regression quotation was created and DELETEd in test_package_quotation_with_pdf_and_public_link; archived-filter test restored+deleted its own item. (Pre-existing leftover client 'TEST Cliente 1776985520' from an earlier iteration is still in /clients but unrelated to Fase B — main agent may wipe via /api/clients/{id} if desired.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase B is green end-to-end. To re-run quickly: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_fase_b_quotations.py /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_regression.py -v` (6 tests, ~3s). UI flow uses data-testids listed in success_rate; the only missing one is `package-card-<id>` on the Paquete step — main agent should add it before any future package-step UI automation. Sidebar Auditoría link is /app/audit and is gated to company_admin (executive gets 403).
